claim: Specialized agents perform better than generic agents; design agents with specific roles (data analyst, content creator, designer) each with targeted skills
actionable: Define clear agent roles and skills; group related skills (content creation, data visualization) into dedicated agents; route tasks to appropriate agents
source_title: Claude Code: Build Your Full AI Marketing Team (Agents + Claude Skills)

claim: CLAUDE.md file with agent routing rules ensures agents are used appropriately; reduces context waste and improves system reliability
actionable: Create CLAUDE.md with explicit routing rules; specify which tasks require agents vs. skills alone; keep instructions clear and decision criteria objective
source_title: Claude Code: Build Your Full AI Marketing Team (Agents + Claude Skills)

claim: Reference-based skill building (providing templates/examples) teaches agents to follow branded patterns more reliably than generic prompts
actionable: Create detailed analysis of templates; include before/after examples; teach agents to extract patterns from templates; verify compliance with originals
source_title: Claude Code: Build Your Full AI Marketing Team (Agents + Claude Skills)

claim: MCP server setup enables agents to connect to external tools (image generation, data sources); improves skill capabilities without hard-coding
actionable: Set up .mcp.json with external tool credentials; document MCP servers available to agents; let agents discover and use external capabilities
source_title: Claude Code: Build Your Full AI Marketing Team (Agents + Claude Skills)

claim: Complex multi-agent tasks benefit from explicit planning agents that expand vague requirements before delegating to specialized builders
actionable: Use planning step to research and synthesize requirements; expand into detailed specs; then delegate building to specialized agents
source_title: Claude Code: Build Your Full AI Marketing Team (Agents + Claude Skills)

claim: Shared task boards (Notion) enable asynchronous task pickup by agents; agents scan, prioritize, and execute with human oversight optional
actionable: Create shared task board with status tracking; teach agents to scan and update status; enable human-in-loop approval or fully autonomous execution
source_title: Claude Code: Build Your Full AI Marketing Team (Agents + Claude Skills)

claim: Remote control via mobile link enables delegating tasks to agents from anywhere; agents execute while user is away, with context limit management
actionable: Activate remote control in Claude Code; share link to mobile; send tasks asynchronously; clear context when full to restart fresh sessions
source_title: Claude Code: Build Your Full AI Marketing Team (Agents + Claude Skills)
